docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, FEDERICO AS TO DEFENDANT FERRE, ANDRE AN IND/DBA ROGER & SON CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
